name: Update Login and Signup Pages UI
goal: Modify the login and signup pages to remove the icon background container, increase the icon size, and replace the sparkles icon with icon.png in the signup page.
summary: The user wants to update the visual presentation of the login and signup pages. Specifically, in the login page, the icon container (background) should be removed and the icon made larger. In the signup page, the same changes apply, but additionally, the Sparkles icon needs to be replaced with the logo image (icon.png).
context_assumptions: The project uses Next.js with Tailwind CSS.
The image file 'icon.png' is available in the public directory.
The 'login' and 'signup' pages share a similar layout structure with a decorative side panel containing an icon.

files_to_modify.purpose: Remove the background container for the icon and increase its size.
Remove the background container for the icon, increase its size, and replace the Sparkles icon with icon.png.

constraints: Ensure the image file 'icon.png' exists in the public folder.
acceptance_criteria: Login page icon has no background container and is larger (64x64).
Signup page icon has no background container, is larger (64x64), and uses icon.png instead of Sparkles.
notes: The original login page already used icon.png but had a background container. The signup page used a Sparkles icon. Both are now updated to match the requested style.
